message:
test(e2e): add config --show E2E tests and TUI config save/cancel
integration tests with package resource fixture helpers

tests/e2e_cli.rs:
- e2e_cli_config_show_reports_empty_packages_when_none_configured:
  verify --show output contains 'Package resources:' and
  '(no configured packages)' when no packages exist
- e2e_cli_config_show_lists_discovered_package_resources: create
  fixture package with extensions/skills/prompts/themes, configure
  via project settings, verify --show lists all resource paths
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] on assert_json_mode_lifecycle_shape

tests/e2e_tui.rs:
- Add setup_config_ui_fixture() helper that creates a package directory
  with extension, skill, prompt, and theme fixtures plus project
  settings pointing to it
- e2e_tui_config_subcommand_save_persists_resource_filters: launch
  config TUI, verify package header and settings summary appear,
  navigate to skill row, toggle it off, press Enter to save, verify
  project settings JSON has empty skills array and extension still
  listed
- e2e_tui_config_subcommand_cancel_keeps_settings_unchanged: launch
  config TUI, toggle extension off, press 'q' to cancel, verify
  settings file unchanged (still string package reference, not
  rewritten object)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
